    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final PollingStrategy
    PollingStrategies.Presets.DEFAULT
    Default polling strategy: - Base interval: 1 second - Backoff rate: 2x - Jitter: FULL - Max interval 10 second
    Methods in software.amazon.lambda.durable.retry that return PollingStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PollingStrategy
    PollingStrategies.at(Instant instant)
    Creates a polling strategy that polls at a specific instant in time.
    static PollingStrategy
    PollingStrategies.exponentialBackoff(Duration baseInterval, double backoffRate, JitterStrategy jitter, Duration maxInterval)
    Creates an exponential backoff polling strategy.
    static PollingStrategy
    PollingStrategies.fixedDelay(Duration interval)
    Creates a fixed-delay polling strategy that uses the same interval for every attempt.
